title: schultesia brachyptera
intro: Schultesia brachyptera is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae, commonly known as a type of bushman's hat or Schultesia. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Schultesia brachyptera include its ability to treat fever, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from rheumatic pain and other inflammatory conditions. Herbal preparations of Schultesia brachyptera can be made by infusing the leaves or roots in water or oil, and can be taken as a tea or applied topically as a poultice or ointment.
